message:
feat(fwc): Decouple package build pipeline and update supporting dependencies

Package command improvements:
- Extract package_connector() as a public function returning PackageOutput,
  decoupling the build pipeline from CLI output formatting
- Export PACKAGE_OUTPUT_FILENAME constant for downstream consumers
- Switch cargo build invocation to rch exec for remote compilation support
- Persist package metadata as JSON alongside the binary artifact
- Rename SBOM tool field from "fcp-cli" to "fwc" across code and tests

Supporting changes:
- fwc/Cargo.toml: Add tempfile dependency for staging infrastructure
- fcp-async-core/Cargo.toml: Minor dependency update
- fcp-registry/src/lib.rs: Minor adjustment for new command support
- policy_cmd.rs: Minor test/help text adjustment
- Cargo.lock: Updated with tempfile resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -64,7 +64,7 @@ pub enum RegistryError {
     #[error("manifest signing bytes serialization failed: {0}")]
     SigningBytes(SerializationError),
     #[error("canonical serialization failed: {0}")]
-    Canonical(SerializationError),
+    Canonical(#[from] SerializationError),
     #[error("signature bytes malformed")]
     SignatureBytes,
     #[error("object store failure: {0}")]

@@ -46,3 +46,6 @@ tracing.workspace = true
 toon = { package = "tru", path = "/dp/toon_rust" }
 url.workspace = true
 uuid.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+tempfile = "3"
